stand.ripplez.za_hando.desc: An humanoid Power-Type Stand that has the ability to erase anything that touches with its right hand, its broken ability gets compensated with its low speed
jojo_ripples.skill.erasure.desc: Erase your target dealing from 0.1 up to 0.8 damage of its total health, if the target is smaller than your stand and has less max health it can be deleted instantly
jojo_ripples.skill.erase_finisher.desc: Erase your target dealing from 0.1 up to 0.8 damage of its total health, if the target is smaller than your stand and has less max health it can be deleted instantly, it has a probability of deleting one enemy armor or arm slot
jojo_ripples.skill.erase_space.desc: Erase the space that is between you and your target
jojo_ripples.skill.erase_items.desc: Erase the items you are selecting in your inventory
jojo_ripples.skill.erase_items.controls: C on item in the inventory
stand.ripplez.white_snake.desc: A humanoid Stand-Type power that has the power of psyche manipulation, such as illusions, this power mainly manifest in form of discs, whose are able to contain orders to the target or store the target memories or Stand-Type power
jojo_ripples.skill.put_disc.desc: Put the disc your Stand has in its main hand on the target
jojo_ripples.skill.throw_disc.desc: Throw the disc your Stand has in its main hand
jojo_ripples.skill.discfy.desc: Puts the target on a state where its discs are shown up, ready to be extracted with white snake
jojo_ripples.skill.take_memory.desc: Take out the memory disc of an entity that has its discs out
jojo_ripples.skill.take_stand.desc: Take out the stand disc of an entity that has its discs out
jojo_ripples.skill.fake_snake.desc: Take out the stand disc of an entity that has its discs out
